title: Roasted Broccoli with Sprouting and Intense Sauce
description: A Japanese-inspired side dish featuring roasted broccoli, sprouting broccoli, and a savory sauce.

ingredients.name: broccoli
ingredients.notes: 1 head for roasting, 1 head for sprouting

instructions: Toss broccoli with 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for 15-20 minutes or until tender.
In a blender or food processor, combine intense sauce ingredients and blend until smooth.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add sprouting broccoli and cook for 2-3 minutes or until tender.
Stir in intense sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
To serve, place roasted broccoli on a plate and top with sprouting broccoli and intense sauce.
Garnish with roast broccoli and serve immediately.
